## Properties

| Property          | Attribute          | Description                                                                            | Type      | Default     |
| ----------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ----------- |
| `ariaDescribedby` | `aria-describedby` | Optional additional description id(s).                                                 | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `ariaLabel`       | `aria-label`       | Accessible name via aria-label (used only if ariaLabelledby is not provided).          | `string`  | `''`        |
